file: 1237_Lu 等 - 2016 - Hydrocracking of bio-alkanes over PtAl-MCM-41 mesoporous molecular sieves for bio-jet fuel producti.txt

experiments.description: 在Pt/Al-MCM-41介孔分子筛催化剂上，对由生物柴油加氢脱氧产生的生物烷烃（n-十六烷和n-十八烷的混合物）进行加氢裂化，以生产生物航煤。系统考察了温度、压力、重时空速(WHSV)和H2/正构烷烃重量比对转化率和产物分布的影响。
experiments.text_snippet: The catalysts were tested in the hydrocracking of bio-alkanes, produced from biodiesel hydrodeoxygenation and composed of n-hexadecane and n-octadecane, for the production of bio-jet fuel. The effects of temperature, pressure, weight hourly space velocity (WHSV), and H2/n-paraffin weight ratio on bio-alkanes conversion and product distribution were examined.

Operation mode.value: Tubular trickle packed-bed reactor, continuous flow
Operation mode.original: Tubular trickle packed-bed reactor, continuous flow

Product yield.original: Liquid yield >90% (82.8-93.3% depending on H₂/n-paraffin ratio)

Catalyst stability.original: Improved by Al incorporation into MCM-41 material (thicker walls)
